tests.name: Send Encrypted Text Message

tests.name: End-to-End Message Flow Integrity
steps: Send an encrypted message (Scenario 1)

tests.expectedResult: The entire flow is secure, messages are delivered co [2D [K correctly, and metadata protection is maintained.
